title: FM Logistic India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: FM Logistic India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
